query: Generate Drift tests for the POST /shapes endpoint in `evals/fixtures/discriminator-with-allof.yaml`. The request body uses a discriminator.
expected_behavior: Triggers the openapi-parser skill to handle the discriminator and allOf composition
Produces an analysis identifying 2 discriminator variants (circle, rectangle) from the oneOf/discriminator mapping, plus 1 negative test for the 400 — 3 tests total
Generates one Drift operation per discriminator value: createShape_circle (type: circle, radius: <value>) and createShape_rectangle (type: rectangle, width: <value>, height: <value>)

For each discriminator branch, resolves the allOf composition correctly — merging ShapeBase required fields (type) with the branch-specific required fields (radius for Circle; width+height for Rectangle)
Sets the discriminator property explicitly in each request body (type: circle / type: rectangle)
Generates a 400 negative test (createShape_missingRequired or similar) that omits required fields and uses ignore: { schema: true }
Names operations following the {operationId}_{variant} convention with camelCase discriminator suffix
